name: Chocolate Crunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Set up a double boiler with simmering water in the bottom pot.
2. Place the chocolate chips and butterscotch chips into the top pot.
3. Heat gently, stirring until all chips are melted and smooth.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Gradually fold in the chow mein noodles.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
7. Allow to cool completely.
